## Summary

Describe the change and the problem it solves.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Tests / build tooling

## Testing

Describe the tests or manual checks performed.

## Privacy and filesystem safety

- [ ] This change does not silently transmit document content.
- [ ] This change does not implicitly modify original user files.
- [ ] Database migration implications have been considered.
- [ ] Sensitive values are not written to logs.

## Screenshots

Add screenshots for visible interface changes.

## Checklist

- [ ] I read `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [ ] The build succeeds locally.
- [ ] Documentation is updated where needed.
- [ ] The pull request is focused and contains no generated build products or secrets.
